title: PikaVideoRequest
description: Common request schema for Pika 2.2 video generation endpoints (text-to-video and image-to-video) via fal.ai.

prompt.description: Text description of the video or motion to generate.
examples: The man and the horse are slowly walking towards the camera, the camera orbits and dolly out

image_url.description: URL of the image to use as the first frame (required for image-to-video only).

negative_prompt.description: Text describing features to avoid in the generated video.

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio of the generated video (text-to-video only).

resolution.description: Output resolution of the generated video.

duration.description: Duration of the generated video in seconds.

seed.description: Seed for reproducibility. Omit or set to null for random results.
